---
title: "The Rev. Edward Atkinson"
---

## The Rev. Edward Atkinson

**Dates:** (1819-1915)

### Description

Master of Clare College, Cambridge.

### Biography

Atkinson married [[person:71]Frances Hester Carter Smith], sister of CMY\'s correspondent Ann Carter Smith, on becoming Master of Clare College, Cambridge in 1856 and held that office to his death.

### Letters

- Letter from April 28th 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
